ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "wspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wgust" REAL /* Wind gust in meters per second */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humid" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "dewp" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the overall quality of the data entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., City, State, Country) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the weather station */,
  "elevation_unit" TEXT /* Unit of elevation (e.g., meters, feet) */,
  "sensor_count" INTEGER /* Number of sensors at the station */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* List of sensor types used at the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., sensor, API) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data sync */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data sync (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered during data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather parameter (e.g., Wind Speed, Temperature) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., m/s, °C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value for the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Alternative units of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter value */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the weather parameter */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for each parameter value */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES weather_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather parameter */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (0-100) */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality metric */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the overall quality of the data entry */,
  "quality_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the quality issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES weather_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., data collection, data processing) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., sensor, API, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g., high wind, low temperature) */,
  "alarm_description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "alarm_status" TEXT /* Status of the alarm (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alarm was triggered */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alarm (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the alarm resolution */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast model */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model (0-100) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the forecast model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
